title: Aurora, 61166, Mini Flopsie BESSIE Loch Ness Monster, 8In, Soft Toy, Green
features: From Aurora's highly popular Nessie Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Nessie Loch Ness animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: Aurora World’s highly popular Scottish Souvenir range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Bessie, Loch Ness. Made using the finest plush materials, this green Loch Ness has a floppy bean bag body and is perfect as a gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
